message:
fix(status,health): detect empty search index with populated database

status and health commands now probe the Tantivy doc count when the
database has messages. An empty index (0 documents) with a populated
database is flagged as unhealthy with a clear remediation message,
closing the gap where cass doctor already detected this but status
and health did not.

Closes #177

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
